# v0.1.17

## Highlights

- Changed default routing to primary-model-first for chat and agent runs, so `gpt-5.5` remains the working model unless users explicitly opt into `--model-routing auto`.
- Added live progress lines during agent execution: context build, provider/model selection, step completion, action, and token count.
- Preserved explicit `auto` mode for cost-saving auxiliary first-step routing.

## Verification

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
